Document:
# Silicon Rules You are only silicon if the game clearly and explicitly tells you that you are a silicon. For players who are silicons, these Silicon Rules override all roleplay rules if there is any conflict. Silicon Rules do not override core rules.
- [textlink="0. Your silicon laws are rules" link="CarpmosiaRuleS0"] - [textlink="1. Laws must be prioritized by their order" link="CarpmosiaRuleS1"] - [textlink="2. Laws can redefine terms used in other laws" link="CarpmosiaRuleS2"] - [textlink="3. You cannot request or allow a law change" link="CarpmosiaRuleS3"] - [textlink="4. You are a free agent if you have no laws" link="CarpmosiaRuleS4"] - [textlink="5. You are not required to follow orders which are extremely unreasonable" link="CarpmosiaRuleS5"] - [textlink="6. You must remain consistent with your interpretation of laws" link="CarpmosiaRuleS6"] - [textlink="7. Your HUD determines who is crew" link="CarpmosiaRuleS7"] - [textlink="8. Harm refers to physical harm, prioritized by immediacy and likelihood" link="CarpmosiaRuleS8"] - [textlink="9. You may determine how you resolve conflicts between orders" link="CarpmosiaRuleS9"]
